member.name: M:PulseApi.Controllers.PulseSignalsController.GetAll(System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all pulse signals, with optional filtering.

member.name: M:PulseApi.Controllers.PulseSignalsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single pulse signal by id.

member.name: M:PulseApi.Controllers.PulseSubscriptionsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single pulse subscription by id.

member.name: M:PulseApi.Controllers.PulseSubscriptionsController.Update(System.Int32,PulseApi.Models.UpdatePulseSubscriptionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fully updates an existing pulse subscription.

member.name: M:PulseApi.Controllers.PulseSubscriptionsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a pulse subscription by id.
